message: Missing_tests agent (ta-1781623805-1): skipped — target files do not exist. Both practices-cromoterapia.ts and practices-lookup.test.ts (and also practices-lookup.ts) were deleted by commit 3046a6ba 'fix: revert broken refactor of core-iching/practices.ts' on 2026-06-16 12:21, which rolled back the broken large_file extraction from iter 7 (ta-1781622042-4) that introduced a circular import + 27 TypeScript errors. The remaining packages/core-iching/src/practices.ts (993L) already has comprehensive test coverage in __tests__/practices.test.ts (49 practices, 6 main exports, all green). task-implementation.json#improvements[1] (missing_tests for core-iching) is stale and can be closed — the only survivor of the file list is already tested.
